page.title: Import customers
page.description: Upload a customer file to make offer creation faster.

card.title: Customer upload
card.description: Pick a CSV file with at least a customer name column. Existing names are reused automatically.
card.dropOne: or drop one onto this field
card.importDone: Saved {count, plural, one {# customer} other {# customers}}.
